judge_result.judge:
@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After correctly querying the business and review data, the agent’s Python implementation used a state-extraction regex on the business descriptions that returned no matches (execute_python produced "No states could be extracted from business descriptions."), causing it to give up instead of computing the top state (PA) and its average rating.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent followed a correct plan (extract state from business.description, map businessref_ to businessid_, join with reviews, aggregate) but its execute_python implementation repeatedly crashed with a KeyError 'business_id' when iterating over business records, leading it to abort and return an inability message instead of computing the result.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

B. Failure modes encountered:
